entry.title: Re: Import substances of own "regulatory lists" to SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hello

I am sorry. We wait currently for release on premise version (hopefully in november 2025). Up to  know we are "happy" to understand the "basics".

Your topic is quite interesting anyhow... But based on best knowledge:

Step by step SAP and 3E will delivery more content. in 2023 Version there is currently a "online" version available for getting content updates.

As the ued interface is a "open interface" (the interface is not a "3E" only interface according to my knowledge) you might be able to load data as you plan load/populate. But because of capacity: we have not yet checked this on our side.

C.B.

E.g. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/latest-content-updates-for-product-compliance-and-more/ba-p/13589382 could be of intetest.

and https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/08db72bf9f8e4cc58b5e8f97c0285458.html?version=2408.500&locale=en-US

Check e.g https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/ca3ffde3aa0c4b79bed6a794e15640e3.html?version=2408.500&locale=en-US

entry.title: In VA01/VA02, the user exit USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT cannot update the custom fields in VBAK. how do?
entry.content:
In VA01/VA02, the user exit USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT cannot update the custom fields in VBAK. What should I do?

I am using USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT to call a third-party system. After that system returns a value, I need to update the custom field in VBAK with the returned value. However, using UPDATE VBAK doesn't work, and assigning the value directly to XVBAK doesn't work either.

Is there any good solution? I just want to handle this within USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT.

entry.title: Re: MDK How can I dynamically select Object Table item on...

entry.title: Re: DRC
entry.content:
Hello @Sunny10 

Yes, there are some key differences between DRC (Document and Reporting Compliance) in Public Cloud and Private Cloud:

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, DRC is delivered as a standardised, pre-configured solution with limited flexibility; you can use the available reports and integration options, but deep custom development or country-specific extensions are restricted.

In Private Cloud, you have more control over customising, extensions, and technical setup, allowing for broader adaptations to meet specific legal or business requirements.

The core compliance functions are similar across both, but Public Cloud follows stricter standardisation to ensure upgrade stability.

Reference:
SAP Help – Document and Reporting Compliance  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using Germany as a case study

Hope that helps clarify!

Thank you and kind regards

entry.title: Re: Custom field update in VBAK table
entry.content: "How to solve this problem?"

entry.title: How to activate Transaction Builder in SAP MDK ( not JAVA/SWIFT )
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have been trying to find the best way to group offline transactions in a batch and so far I have only found people talking about Chain Sets actions which I understand it is more used for a Modal page type of wizard where all the steps are saved(not recorded in the normal Offline store) and then post it all together. So from what I understood if we don't use that then we need to use independent requests. However I now found in the documentation that we can activate "Transaction Builder" which suppose to work with the Transaction IDs we set on each OData request and group them together as we need. Am I correct or is this actually part of Chainsets actions ? If it is not the same as Chainsets, how do I activate this in a MDK project? I can only see examples for JAVA/SWIFT here Additional Features - SAP Mobile Services Documentation

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Conexão SAP além-fronteiras! SIT Paraguay
entry.content:
Manuel,

Que iniciativa inspiradora! É incrível ver o SAP Inside Track Fortaleza se conectando com o SIT Paraguay para trocar experiências e fortalecer a comunidade SAP na América Latina. 

Essa ponte entre os países mostra o verdadeiro poder da colaboração e abre portas valiosas para quem deseja expandir horizontes profissionais. Parabéns pela construção dessa rede tão relevante!

entry.title: Re: Custom tokens in Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi @piotr_retecki ,

In SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0, handling custom tokens for onboarding emails where multiple Job Relationships are maintained is a known limitation area. Here's a clear explanation and potential solutions based on standard system behavior and possible workarounds:

System Limitation
Tokens in Onboarding emails pull data from standard fields available in Process Objects or Direct Mapping.

For Job Relationships, if multiple entries exist (e.g., multiple Managers, HR, Matrix Managers), the system always picks the first record by default.

There is no native way to dynamically select a specific job relationship for a token based on type (e.g., Direct Manager, HR Manager, Matrix Manager) unless that relationship is mapped directly to a dedicated field.

Recommended Solution in Onboarding 2.0
Mapping Job Relationship Fields to Dedicated Process Object Fields
During Recruit-to-Hire Data Mapping or Manage Data Collection, map specific Job Relationships (e.g., Direct Manager, Matrix Manager, HR Manager) to dedicated custom fields in the Onboarding Process Object.

These dedicated fields (e.g., cust_directManagerName, cust_HRManagerName) can then be exposed as tokens in Onboarding emails.

Example Setup
Job Relationship Type Target Field in Process Object Token in Email
Direct Manager cust_directManagerName [[cust_directManagerName]]
HR Manager cust_HRManagerName [[cust_HRManagerName]]

Steps to Achieve This
Go to Recruit-to-Hire Mapping or Data Collection Configuration.
Create custom fields in the Onboarding Process Object to store the specific Job Relationship names.
Use Business Rules during data collection or mapping to fetch the correct name based on the Job Relationship Type.
Reference those custom fields as tokens in your onboarding email templates.

Why Direct Token Mapping to Job Relationships Fails
The Job Relationships object is a composite/multivalued association.

Tokens don't natively handle filtering or conditional selection within such associations.

Hence, system only picks the first record, regardless of type.

Alternative (Less Recommended) Options
Manual Entry During Onboarding
If feasible, collect the required names manually during the onboarding data collection step.

Custom MDF Object Approach
Maintain a custom object that stores the specific relationship names in a controlled way and map those to the Onboarding Process.

Key Considerations
This method requires configuration adjustments in Onboarding 2.0 Process Objects and Email Services.

Coordination with your Implementation Partner or Admin with access to Data Models is essential.

Ensure you test end-to-end to confirm correct values appear in the generated emails.

Conclusion
You cannot directly control which Job Relationship is pulled by tokens due to system limitations.
Best practice is to map specific job relationships to dedicated fields, then use those fields as tokens in email templates.
This method is widely used in SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 to overcome this token limitation.

Hope this helps!!

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Obj...
entry.content:
Hello @DanielSchneider 

Good question, this is expected behaviour in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Access Policies (Object Type: DRAS) cannot be transported between tenants, such as from Development to Quality or Production. This is by design, as certain security-related artefacts like access policies must be created and maintained separately in each tenant to ensure system stability and compliance.

In your case, the error message:

"Object DRAS ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER is not permitted. Object type DRAS cannot be transported"

is consistent with this restriction.

Next Steps:
You’ll need to manually recreate the Access Policy in the target tenant
Raising an SAP Incident is recommended to confirm this limitation in your tenant and check for any roadmap updates

SAP Help reference below,
SAP Help – Extensibility Restrictions (S/4HANA Cloud)

Hope this helps to clarify!

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: shipping conditions
entry.content:
Hi Kuntla 
The 2 points considered for determination of Shipping Conditions are :

1. Shipping Conditions in Sales Doc type Config(VOV8- Shipping tab )

2. Customer Master 

Priority Wise : By Default Shipping Conditon mentioned in Sales doc type config has higher priority than the one in customer master

entry.title: User SAPSR3DB does not exist during an SAP Netweaver fresh installation
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm installing SAP Netweaver 7.5 on a new windows server and I'm receiving an error "user 'SAPSR3DB' does not exist", but i think this is not usually done manually and not sure which issues that may cause.

I did create SAPSR3DB manually (with authorizations CONNECT, RESOURCE, DBA, UNLIMITED TABLESPACE), but then i face another error "tablespace 'PSAPTEMP' does not exist".

Guess i'm not supposed to create such database objects manually so i'm beginning to think that something is wrong with this installation, although i'm not understanding what. Dropped the users and restarted this installation from zero, and i stop in this exact same error.

Thank you in advance to whoever might help.

Kind regards, Pedro

entry.title: Bringing AI to SAP: Integrating Amazon Connect Q into Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
SAP Service Cloud offers seamless Computer Telephony Integration (CTI) capabilities, enabling agents to connect directly with contact center platforms like Amazon Connect. In this blog, we'll walk through the steps to configure the CTI adapter in SAP Service Cloud and validate the integration end-to-end.

 

Prerequisites: Amazon Connect Details Required from AWS Team

To successfully integrate Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud using the CTI adapter, please collect the following details from the AWS (Amazon Connect) team:

1. Amazon Connect CloudFront URL

  1. Example: https://d23xxxxxxx.cloudfront.net
  2. Purpose: Used in SAP CTI configuration as the Provider URL.
  3. This CloudFront distribution must be configured to host the CCP (Contact Control Panel) for Amazon Connect.

2. Agent Credentials (for Testing)

  1. AgentUserNameParam
  2. AgentPasswordParam
  3. These credentials are required to log in to the softphone widget within SAP Service Cloud.

3. Trusted Origin Domain (for SAP)

  1. SAP Service Cloud domain (e.g., myxxxxx.crm.ondemand.com) should be added as a trusted origin in the Amazon Connect instance settings.

4. Contact Flow Setup (Optional but Recommended)

  1. The contact flow configured to route incoming calls to the right agent queue.
  2. Helps simulate real call scenarios during testing.

5. User/Agent Setup Confirmation

  1. Confirm that the test agent is assigned to the correct routing profile and queue in Amazon Connect.
  2. This ensures the call is delivered properly to the agent via the embedded widget.

6. Call Recording and Transcript Configuration (Optional)

Ensure that call recording and transcript features are enabled in Amazon Connect to leverage the Phone Transcript Summary in SAP Service Cloud.

Step 1: Configure the CTI Adapter

  1. Log in to SAP Service Cloud.
  2. Click on the user icon (top-right corner) and select Settings.
  3. Navigate to All Settings → CTI Configuration.
  4. Choose Amazon Connect as the communication provider.
  5. Enter the Amazon Connect CloudFront distribution URL (e.g., https://d23xxxxxxx.cloudfront.net) in the Provider URL field.

Step 2: Adjust Content Security Policies

To ensure the CloudFront domain is trusted by SAP Service Cloud:

  1. Go to Settings → Content Security Policy Settings.
  2. Add the CloudFront domain (e.g., d23xxxxxxx.cloudfront.net) under all relevant sections to whitelist it.

Step 3: Validate the End-to-End Integration

  1. Log in to SAP Service Cloud.
  2. Click the CTI-Widget icon in the top-right corner.
  3. The Amazon Connect softphone should appear on the right panel, prompting you to log in.
  4. Enter the credentials (AgentUserNameParam and AgentPasswordParam) configured during the Amazon CDK deployment.
  5. After logging in, close the popup and refresh the page if needed.
  6. Set the agent status to Available in the softphone panel.

Step 4: Simulate an Incoming Call

  • Customer interacts with the website through the chatbot, the system automatically captures the engagement and logs it in the contact’s interaction history. This ensures a unified and comprehensive view of all customer touchpoints across channels.

  • The agent accepts incoming requests initiated by Chatbot and agent desktop will open automatically 

  • Interaction Between Agent and Customer

  • The agent's desktop will automatically save the transcript you can filter the interactions with chat 

  • When we click on the chat, it navigates to Amazon, where all chat interactions are stored, and an AI-generated summary is automatically created

 

Step 5: Complete the Call and Review Transcripts

  1. Once the call concludes, click Close Contact in the softphone panel.
  2. Refresh the timeline to view a new entry labeled Phone Transcript Summary (note: this may take a few minutes to appear).
  3. Click on the Phone Transcript entry to open a detailed view containing:
    • Call details and summary
    • Conversational analytics
    • Customer sentiment and talk time
    • Call recording
    • Full transcript with sentiment analysis

This configuration empowers customer service agents to efficiently handle calls directly within SAP Service Cloud, enhancing the customer experience with real-time insights and automation.

Could this be an issue on the Work Zone side?

Also looking forward to some advice from SAP on how to avoid this issue.

entry.title: Retrofit setup - project landscape - Domain link
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have configured the retrofit and while saving configuration following message is showing.

For security reasons I have given the source SID as ABC for BAU and XYZ as project landscape in this forum.

BAU Source system: ABC ~ ABAP/200 ; 

Project landscape target system : XYZ / 200

We have only built DEV (XYZ) in project landscape and configured QAS as a virtual system (yet to build).

So while saving the Retrofit configuration, below warning message occurred.

================================================================

Diagnosis

Systems ABC~ABAP/200 and XYZ~ABAP/200 are not in the same domain and there is no domain link between them.

 

System Response

You may experience problems when using the retrofit functions.

 

Procedure

Linking two domains with a domain link involves two steps:

 

1. Request a link between two domains.

2. Confirm the link between the two domains.

Requesting a Link Between Two Domains

To request a link between two transport domains, proceed as follows:

 

1. Log on to one of the two domain controller systems.

2. Call transaction STMS.

3. Choose Overview -> Systems.

The system overview appears.

4. Choose SAP System -> Create -> Domain link.

The dialog box Request for Linking 2 Domains appears.

5. Enter the system name, host name, and system number of the domain controller you want to link to and confirm your entries.

Your SAP System performs the following actions automatically:

Generates the required RFC destinations

Sends the address data of the controller to the controller in the other domain.

You can now see that you have requested the domain link to the other domain in the system overview.

For security reasons, you now need to confirm the link between the two domains in the other controller.

Confirming a Link Between Two Domains

To confirm a link between two transport domains, proceed as follows:

1. Log on to the domain controller in the other domain.

2. Call transaction STMS.

3. Choose Overview -> Systems.

The system overview appears.

4. Position the cursor on the domain controller where you requested the domain link and choose SAP System -> Approve.

5. Confirm the prompt and distribute the configuration.

The two domain controllers now exchange all necessary information about the systems in their domains. This information is distributed to all systems in the domain whose controller you are currently logged on to. A transport profile is generated, which contains all systems in both domains.

The information about the systems in the other domain is not automatically distributed to the systems in the domain where you requested the domain link. This means that you must distribute the new configuration to these systems.

===========================================================================

Solution Manager is our domain controller. We have added / configured XYZ (project landscape DEV system) into Domain Controller (solution Manager).

My question is ,

Though Solman and XYZ are in same domain controller, do we have to create a domain link between solman and XYZ system (project landscape system)?

entry.title: Empowering SAP Service Cloud V2 with OpenText: Seamless Integration for Document Management
entry.content:
In today's digital-first customer service landscape, managing documents efficiently is crucial for ensuring speed, compliance, and seamless service delivery. SAP Service Cloud V2 now supports powerful integration with OpenText, enabling agents to securely manage, store, and retrieve customer documents within a single interface. This blog outlines the key steps to configure OpenText with SAP Service Cloud V2 and highlights how the integration streamlines customer interactions.

📌 Why OpenText + SAP Service Cloud V2?

The integration enables organizations to:

  • Centralize document storage and access directly within SAP.
  • Ensure compliance with data governance and retention policies.
  • Provide agents with a 360° view of customer interactions—including documents, cases, and correspondence.
  • Automate document capture, archiving, and retrieval processe

🔧 Prerequisites: What You Need Before Integration

Before starting the configuration, ensure you have the following:

OpenText Extended Account Access

  • Administrator credentials to access the OpenText .
  • API and endpoint URLs.

SAP Service Cloud V2 Tenant Details

  • V2 instance with admin access.
  • Role-based authorization to manage integration settings.

OpenText Endpoint (Base URL) for Mashup

  • Example: https://contentserver.opentext.example.com
    Purpose: This acts as the destination for all document management operations.

Authentication Credentials (for Testing)

  • Username: <OpenTextUser>
  • Password: <OpenTextPassword>
    These credentials will be used to authenticate API calls from SAP to OpenText during testing and validation.

SAP Domain Whitelisting (Trusted Origin)

  • Your SAP Service Cloud domain must be added as a trusted origin within the OpenText configuration and vice versa. This ensures secure cross-origin communication between the two platforms.

Folder & Document Structure Setup (Recommended)

  • Predefine folder structures and metadata rules in OpenText to simulate realistic document storage scenarios during integration testing. This helps ensure documents are correctly categorized, archived, and retrieved within SAP Service Cloud V2.

Step 1: Configure the Open Text mashup 

  1. Log in to SAP Service Cloud.
  2. Click on the user icon (top-right corner) and select Settings.
  3. Navigate to All Settings → Extensibility → Mashup Authoring.
  4. Add the Mashup

Step 2: Adjust Content Security Policies

To ensure the CloudFront domain is trusted by SAP Service Cloud:

  1. Go to Settings → Content Security Policy Settings.
  2. Add the CloudFront domain (e.g., opentext.com) under all relevant sections to whitelist it.

Step 3: Add Mashup in case the End-to-End Integration

  • Embed the OpenText mashup within the Case screen for easy access.
  • Seamlessly navigate to the OpenText Tab document in SAP Service Cloud.
  • Choose the appropriate communication channel for document storage or retrieval.

  • select the channel

  • Upon clicking the Submit button, the document is generated and added to the 'General → Attachments' section

The reference document can be shared with the customer via the case email channel, allowing the process to continue seamlessly in alignment with the company's defined workflow

📌 Conclusion

Integrating OpenText with SAP Service Cloud V2 provides a unified digital workspace for agents—combining customer data, case insights, and document management in one platform. This not only boosts operational efficiency but also strengthens compliance, transparency, and customer satisfaction.

If you're looking to enhance your SAP V2 experience, OpenText integration is a strategic step toward intelligent service management.

entry.title: 🚀 What’s New in Cloud Control Center PL21 – Smarter, Safer, and More in Control
entry.content:
Cloud Control Center PL 21

📅Released: June 23, 2025

📍Target audience: SAP Business One Partners, Cloud Operators, SAP Business One cloud customers and SAP Business One fan base in general.😎

Last week we launched SAP Business One Cloud 1.1 Patch Level 21 (PL21) — and if you’re using Cloud Control Center (CCC) to manage your SAP Business One Cloud landscape, this update is worth your attention.

PL21 is packed with enhancements focused on security, visibility, automation, and flexibility.

👉 In this post, I've rounded up 12 of the most impactful and attractive highlights — the ones i believe will make the biggest difference in your day-to-day operations.

Here’s a quick walk-through of what’s new 👇

 

🔐Certificate Expiration – Now Fully Visible

No more surprises!

The CCC home page now displays certificate expiration dates for your key components (License Servers, Service Layers, Job Services, etc.).

✨Bonus:

An automatic scan is triggered when CCC starts. You’ll get a warning if a certificate is expired or due to expire within the next 30 days — and yes, this can be toggled off in global settings if needed.

 

🔍See SLD Agent Versions at a Glance

You asked, we delivered — SLD Agent version info is now shown in the component details. Easier troubleshooting, less back-and-forth.

🧹 CCC Cleans Up After Itself

Every time you open CCC, it automatically removes logical machine logs older than 6 months.

You can also now remove unused logical machines more easily:

  • If the SLD Agent status is unreachable
  • If no SLD Agent is installed, just restart the SLD service to clean it up.

🔐Dynamic Key Encryption – Now Available for Tenants

Dynamic Key encryption can now be activated for tenants directly in CCC.
Strengthen your security posture without hassle.

 

⚠️UAP/CCC Version Mismatch Warning

If there’s a version mismatch between User Access Portal (UAP) and CCC, you’ll now see a clear warning.

A small heads-up that could save you from bigger issues.

 

⬆️Enforce Tenant Upgrades via Staging Units

A new global setting now lets you restrict tenant upgrades to staging service units only.

This adds a layer of control that’s especially useful in multi-tenant environments.

 

📊Analytics Services Initialization During Upgrade

When duplicating or upgrading tenants on SAP HANA service units, a new checkbox lets you automatically initialize the tenant in Analytics Services.

✅Less manual setup

✅Faster analytics availability

 

🔐Certificate Verification Built-In

Whether you’re installing CCC, UAP, or Tenant Configurator, new steps in the wizard ensure you only proceed with valid certificates in place. It’s a simple but vital enhancement.

 

💾Automatic B1AS Backup During Upgrade

During upgrades of CCC, a new wizard step now backs up the Authentication Service database (B1AS) — just in case. 🙌

 

📈High Availability Setup – Now Streamlined

We’ve made it easier to set up HA for your B1 Cloud components:

  • Simpler nginx reverse proxy installation
  • Updated SLD HA config files
  • No need to choose Admin/Worker mode during install — all nodes are now equal

Less complexity. More flexibility.

 

👥Operator Access with Boundaries

Need to involve someone in SAP Business One implementation without authorization to change CCC settings?

You can now assign the “Read-Only and Open PSU Connection” role — perfect for implementation experts who need access to the product but shouldn’t change cloud settings.

🆕One More Thing…

SAP Business One Cloud 1.1 PL21 now officially supports Microsoft SQL Server 2022.

That’s one more way we’re keeping your platform options open.

💬Your Feedback Matters

We invite you to try out the new features in Cloud Control Center PL21 and tell us what you think!

What’s working well? What would you love to see next?

👇Drop your thoughts in the comments — we’re always listening.

entry.title: invalid lob locator id (piecewise lob reading) Error after upgrading to CAP 9.0.3 and Node.js 20
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering a critical error in my CAP Node.js application after upgrading my dependencies. I would appreciate any help or insights you can provide.

Problem Description:

My Node.js service, which uses @sap/cds, fails with the following error when trying to read an Excel file from a HANA database BLOB column:

error while parsing protocol: invalid lob locator id (piecewise lob reading)

The error occurs specifically in the readExcelSheets function, which reads a Readable stream and converts it into a Buffer. This code worked perfectly before the upgrade.

My Environment & Dependencies:

I recently updated my project to use Node.js 20 and the latest major version of @sap/cds. Here are my relevant dependencies from package.json:

"dependencies": {
  "@cap-js/hana": "^2.1.1",
  "@sap/cds": "^9.0.3",
  "xlsx": "^0.18.5"
},
"devDependencies": {
  "@sap/cds-dk": "^9.0.5",
  "@types/node": "^22.13.1"
}

My SAP HANA Database Version:

My SAP HANA database is running on the following version, as shown in the screenshot from my landscape: 2025.14.5.

Relevant Code Snippet:

The error originates from the following code block in my readExcelSheets function:

 
const readExcelSheets = async (content: Readable | Buffer): Promise<Record<string, any[]>> => {
  let buffer: Buffer;
  if (content instanceof Readable) {
    const chunks: Buffer[] = [];
    for await (const chunk of content) { // <-- The error occurs here
      chunks.push(Buffer.isBuffer(chunk) ? chunk : Buffer.from(chunk));
    }
    buffer = Buffer.concat(chunks);
  } else {
    buffer = Buffer.isBuffer(content) ? content : Buffer.from(content);
  }

  const workbook = XLSX.read(buffer, { type: "buffer" });
  const result: Record<string, any[]> = {};

  // ... rest of the function
  return result;
}

The content variable is fetched from the database using a standard CDS SELECT query:

 
const pendings = await db.run(
  SELECT.from("ExcelUploads")
    .columns("ID", "content", "createdAt")
    .where({ progress: "Pending" })
);

Steps I have taken to troubleshoot:

  1. I initially thought the issue was related to the @sap/cds upgrade.

  2. Based on my research, I suspected a HANA client driver incompatibility with Node.js 20.

  3. I ran npm install @sap/hana-client to update the HANA client driver.

  4. After installing the latest @sap/hana-client (which is likely pulled by @cap-js/hana), I received a new, more specific error:

    [cds] - ❗️Uncaught Error: Invalid Object

    The stack trace points directly to the @sap/hana-client module:

    at Socket.<anonymous> (C:\...\node_modules\@sap\hana-client\lib\index.js:53:13)
at Socket.emit (node:events:519:28)
...
at Readable.push (node:internal/streams/readable:390:5)
at Pipe.onStreamRead (node:internal/stream_base_commons:191:23)
at Pipe.callbackTrampoline (node:internal/async_hooks:130:17) {
  code: -20001,
  sqlState: 'HY000',
  query: false
}
  • Has anyone else experienced this invalid lob locator id or Invalid Object error with @sap/cds 9.x and Node.js 20?

  • Given my HANA version 2025.14.5, is there a specific, compatible version of @sap/hana-client that I should be using with Node.js 20?

  • Is there a CDS configuration setting to alter how BLOB data is read (e.g., to read the entire object at once instead of in pieces)?

Thank you for your time and help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Obj...
entry.content:
Hi Chuma,

thanks for your reply and the provided information!

I found out that the error message was related to another object which was part of the same transport request/task.
The object was an aspect (object type DRAS) which I created first and deleted it right after (since I didn't know how to work with that).

Then I created an access policy (object type DCLS) containing a definition of an aspect inside of it (the one that I posted as screenshot).

As soon as I removed the DRAS object from my transport task, I was able to release it.

So everything is good and there is no issue with the transport request.

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Allocations, using the Universal Allocation
entry.content:
Hi 

I am getting an error message while trying to set up Intercompany Allocation. I entered sender and receiver cost centers belonging to different company codes, but the system is throwing the following error. Can anyone suggest a solution? T

Error - Intercompany cycle 0LZICA1/01.01.2021 can't contain only intra-company code allocations.

FINS_ONE_ALLOCATION/175

entry.title: Re: In VA01/VA02, the user exit USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT cannot update the custom fields in VBAK. how
entry.content: Try all these answers: https://www.google.com/search?q=va02+update+custom+field+vbak%20site:sap.com

entry.title: asset depreciation area
entry.content:
Dear Expert

Our group will update to HANA.  Parallel ledgers adoption base on company code.

Company code of TH subsidiary will have two ledger- leading ledger (0L) for IFRS and nonleading ledger L1 for Local GAAP.

In ECC, we already have two depreciation area- 01 (post to ledger)and 15 tax (not post)

  1. About depreciation area could TH company code do the below in HANA ?
  • depreciation area 01  for leading ledger (0L) IFRS
  • Create depreciation area 10 post to nonleading ledgers (L1) Local GAAP
  • depreciation area 15 not post to any ledgers, only Statistical for Local tax depreciation reporting  (But other company code post to nonleading ledgers L1 Local GAAP)

B. if above A is ok, could creat transaction type for AA transactions to allow T code ABZON(ABZO) adjust APC only in depreciation area 15 ( not post to any ledgers)  ?
Thanks for much for your sugguestion in advance.

entry.title: Re: Step by step procedure to establish Cloud Connector to CPI connection
entry.content: Hi , does this works with sap btp trail account . i am unable to connect to on premise and this is the error message "An authorization problem occurred when downloading the configuration. Check the spelling of the subaccount name, user, and password as well as the validity of the authentication data. See 'Log and Trace Files' and in particular scc_core.trc for details. Associated entries were logged on or around 2025-06-30 00:05:11,312 +0530. Consult SAP note 2571763 for possible remedies."

entry.title: Onboarding P45 Notification
entry.content: Hello - we have noticed that in some cases when a UK candidate is going through Onboarding and completing their compliance form (UK Starter Checklist) that a P45 notification in some situations is being created. We are trying to understand why the notification is being created and where its generating from. It's causing confusion to our UK HR team. Attached is an example of the notification. We checked Email Services and we do not have a P45 notification or UK Starter Checklist notification set up. We also confirmed to the best of our knowledge that the notification is not part of the UK Starter Checklist compliance form. Is anyone aware of this notification? Do you know where its coming from or how to disable it?

entry.title: Re: C4C V2 <> S4 Public Prospect to Account confirmation...
entry.content:
Hello @AdityaPatharkar 

This is a known issue when integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 with S/4HANA Public Cloud via SAP Cloud Integration.

The problem happens because S/4HANA Public Cloud sends a SOAP/XML confirmation, while the standard iFlow expects JSON, leading to the parsing error you’re seeing.

Recommendation 
 Check if you’re using the latest version of the pre-delivered iFlow , recent updates may have addressed payload handling
If the issue persists, raising an SAP Incident is the correct approach, as this likely requires SAP to align the payload formats

You can review SAP Note 3283132 (login required) it addresses payload format mismatches in similar

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: How to configure presentation device for EWM
entry.content: In transaction /n/SCWM/RFUI getting below error. How to configure the presentetation device. Not able to find any blogs on it.

entry.title: Experience the new dictionary user interface in SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub
entry.content:
Overview 

With the SAP Signavio April 2025 Sapphire release, we have published the new dictionary user interface in SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub. It improves the usability and user experience for dictionary users within the Collaboration Hub. 

Benefits 

  • In addition to the existing grid view on the dictionary landing page, a unified table view of categories and subcategories is now available displaying the dictionary categories and subcategories in a single table 
  • A detailed and intuitive page for dictionary entries, helping ensure that the relevant information is grouped logically and easily accessible 

Details 

  • The new landing page enables users to choose between grid and table views displaying key meta information (number of subcategories, entries etc.).  

  • Clicking on a dictionary category displays the existing subcategories in grid/table views. The entries present in the category are shown in the table below. Users can collapse the component that displays subcategories to view a greater number of entries. Clicking on a subcategory displays the entries present in that subcategory in a table.  

 

  • Clicking on a dictionary entry displays the details in two tabs: 
    • ‘Attributes’ tab displays all the attributes according to visibility settings

  • ‘Used In’ tab displays the diagrams and dictionary entries that use this dictionary entry. Users can filter conveniently for specific type(s) of link

On all the screens, users can mark or unmark dictionary categories, subcategories and entries as favorites and use the breadcrumbs to navigate easily and navigate to dictionary in SAP Signavio Process Manager to edit or update dictionary entries as needed. 

To help you get familiar with the new dictionary user interface in SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub, you can refer to the help documentation  available here.

Hi Dan, not sure if you checked the SSCUI list (Configuration Apps) at the link i provided earlier?

Searching for Define Versions

 

I hope this helps

entry.title: Re: Usage of sales kit CPFH and DISH in on-premise?

entry.title: Consumption Not posted in /N/SCWM/RFUI
entry.content:
Have posted a consumption in /N/SCWM/RFUI. Stock got removed. But consumption not posted against production order. 
Have checked in SMQ2 no outbound queue. Where to check here after. I clicked enter here instead of clicking F3 consQ. Is that issue?

entry.title: Re: Issue in MIGO Accounting Entry
entry.content:
Hello @sapcomyogik 

Thank you for sharing the details regarding the incorrect accounting entries generated during MIGO postings in your S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

After reviewing your screenshots and based on standard Public Cloud behaviour, this issue is likely related to the incomplete or incorrect setup of Automatic Account Determination, which is configured exclusively through Central Business Configuration (CBC) in the S4HANA Public Cloud environment.

Please note,
In S/4HANA Public Cloud, classic transactions like OBYC are not available.
All account postings related to stock movements (e.g., MIGO) depend on CBC configuration, including transaction keys like BSX, GBB, WRX, etc.
The material master data, especially Valuation Class and Price Control, must also align with CBC settings to ensure correct accounting entries.

Recommended

  • Review your CBC setup for the affected Movement Type and Valuation Class
  • Confirm that the correct G/L accounts are maintained for all relevant transaction keys
  • Validate Material Master data, particularly Valuation Class and Price Control
  • If needed, perform a test posting after adjusting the CBC configuration

SAP Helpful resource
SAP Help – Automatic Account Determination in S/4HANA Cloud

Hope it helps

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Create product using OData v2
entry.content:
Hello @edward_tollenaar 

The error Cannot Resolve Class Exception: Products happens because the payload from your Integration Flow doesn’t match what API_PRODUCT_SRV expects.

The API requires an A_Product structure avoid extra wrappers like <Products>
Make sure your message mapping outputs exactly the fields for A_Product and properly nests to_Description
Use the official EDMX from the API hub to guide your structure

Check SAP Reference below
API_PRODUCT_SRV – SAP API Business Hub

Once your structure matches the OData spec, the issue should be resolved.

Let me know if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Obj...
entry.content:
Hello @DanielSchneider 

Brilliant 😊 , I am glad the error is now solved

Thank you, and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Shift identity management from SAP IDM to SAP IAG with CIS and GRC AC.
entry.content: Great Blog Saurabh!!! We are soon going to replace SAP IdM with SAP IAG for one of my client. This will be helpful!!

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Billing Date in Return Order CBAR
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have encountered an issue with the Customer Return Order (CBAR) process.

When I create a return order with type CBAR, the system automatically generates a billing document (Credit Memo) immediately after Post Goods Receipt (PGR).

In my business case, the original sales order was created on 30-06-2025 and delivery and billing cycle has been completed on the same day 30-06-2025, but the return order was created on 01-07-2025 for material issue. Due to this, the auto-created billing document picks up the return creation date (01-07-2025), which causes issues with receivables reconciliation and period closing.

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC automation public cloud Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello @Danny5 

Great follow-up, you understood it correctly

  • The QCert for ESeal is required to digitally sign the VAT return and ECL declarations, which ensures legal validity of the submission.

  • The QWAC is needed to establish a secure communication channel (TLS/HTTPS) between your SAP system and the Dutch tax authority.

In most cases, both certificates are provided by the same Trust Service Provider, often bundled in a single .pfx or. p12 file that contains both the private key, the ESeal certificate, and the QWAC.

When uploading to SAP DRC, the system accepts that combined file; that's why you only see one upload option in the configuration.

Good that you’ve already reached out to providers. Typically, once they respond, they can confirm if both certificates are included in their package.

You can refer to

3566762 - How to add additional content on Quality Certificate output item

SAP Help – DRC for the Netherlands previously provided

Feel free to reach out if you need further assistance

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting - Asset Class Customizing (Pbl CLD Edt)
entry.content:
Hello @fmnor79 

Thank you for your clarfication, to be precise:

 You can create new Asset Classes using the Copy as function in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
 However, detailed customising like screen layouts, number range intervals, or useful life settings per Asset Class is not customer-configurable, even via CBC. These are delivered by SAP as part of the standard Public Cloud content to ensure system stability.

You can extend Asset Accounting by copying Asset Classes, but extensive setup elements beyond what CBC exposes (such as point 1-3 you mentioned) are intentionally restricted in Public Cloud.

Unfortunately, the help link I shared earlier was general  for specifics, this provides more context
SAP Help – Asset Accounting Public Cloud (Country-specific)

For additional requirements, an SAP Influence Request would be the official path to propose enhancements.

Hope that helps

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: EDI Setup for Billing Document - S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @GAK1

SAP_COM_0440 is only for Warehouse Stock Transfer Receipt Advice, not connected to billing.

For billing, SAP_COM_0120 is the correct communication scenario. If the connection isn’t working, it’s usually due to below

  • Something missing in the Communication Arrangement for SAP_COM_0120
  • Technical user or endpoint setup not matching
  • Certificate or authentication issues

Refer to SAP_COM_0120 – Billing Integration Setup

I suggest double-checking your Communication Arrangement setup and testing the endpoint with the same credentials via Postman to isolate the issue.

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: how to display technical field name on Fiori
entry.content:
@Alwin_vd_Put

I see the service binding but how to open service binding. pls advise.

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec - I missed a configuration in the bonus calculation. Please disregard my previous question. Thank you for your help to date! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Recommended RAR Structures in interface component con...
entry.content: Many thanks for the support. It was very helpful,

entry.title: Re: Error creating workarea in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi,

It's difficult to say exactly what is wrong but there is one thing that is worth a try before you raise a support ticket.  Please log out of Manager using your account and log in using the 'admin' account that is created during provisioning of your system.  You may need to change the password on this account, from the Administration > Users screen, if you don't have that password.  If everything still fails with that account, you have an issue.

If you have an issue, I think you need to get support involved in this one.  Please raise a support ticket using Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and let support have a more detailed look at your issues.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Unable to deploy value map - Error: Select default value for Source/Target - Cloud foundry
entry.content:
Error shown when trying to deploy artifact: Select default value for Source/Target. 

This only happens in our production environment. Dev and QA we are able to deploy.
The only difference in prod is we have configured values, as the production values are different to test environment.

Any advice is welcomed. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
@mlauber Add a few more similar actions into your RAP BO and then see how the single method Save_Modified expands to handle all those actions. See how many more global variables similar to zbp_r_bookstorestocktp=>gt_job_parameters you would need to declare to get the data passed around between local classes.

My comments are not towards your blog. Thanks for your effort on the blog.

My request is addressed to those brains behind RAP design, to understand that any number of brains put together, they won't be able to come to a finite list of scenarios where people will use RAP, and when people are forced to use RAP for everything (e.g ABAP Cloud or S/4 HANA Public Cloud), they will invent methods like this to achieve their goal. Hence, (repeating from my earlier message), I hope SAP releases some special new action type (similar to static, factory etc) in the future, that allows to do perform the stuff like DB Insert/Commit, that are currently restricted by action

entry.title: SAP Fiori Physical Inventory Application Process
entry.content:
SAP Fiori:

SAP Fiori is a user experience (UX) design system developed by SAP for creating intuitive, responsive, and easy-to-use applications across devices. It simplifies business processes by offering role-based apps that present only relevant information and actions to the user. Fiori apps are built using SAPUI5, a JavaScript-based framework, and follow consistent design guidelines.
They can run on multiple platforms—desktop, tablet, and mobile—providing a seamless experience.
SAP Fiori enhances productivity and user satisfaction by transforming traditional SAP GUI transactions into modern, consumer-grade interfaces.

Physical Inventory:

Physical inventory in SAP is the process of counting and verifying the actual stock in a warehouse or storage location. It ensures that the system stock matches the physical stock on hand, helping maintain inventory accuracy. SAP supports various inventory types like periodic, continuous, and cycle counting. The process involves creating a physical inventory document, counting stock, entering the results, and posting differences. It is essential for financial accuracy, audit compliance, and efficient warehouse operations.

SAP Fiori Physical Inventory Application Process:

Step1: Open the app “Create Physical Inventory” in SAP Fiori

Enter the details.

Warehouse Number

Product

Provide the physical inventory procedure as HS and Check Active PI document and execute.

Select line item in which bin we are going to be counting and click on create.

Will get a message Doc – 6000 is created

 

Step2: Open the app “Warehouse Monitor”

Provide the below details:

Warehouse Number: MN01

Monitor: SAP

Select physical inventory. Enter document number and execute, will get the details.

 

 

Step3: Open the app “RF Environment” to count.

Counting of Components per PI Doc

Click on the “05 Internal Processes”

Then click on the “01 Inventory counting”

Then click on the “02 Inventory counting manually”

Enter the warehouse order number and then click on enter.

Scan the details

Enter Storage Bin and click on enter

Scan the Product and quantity. Then click on next

Scan the quantity. Then click on next.

Then click on the right arrow button.

Then click on F11 save.

We can observe that PI document is counted.

 

Post Physical inventory document.

Document posted.

We can observe PI doc is posted because book stock and system stock are same. So, PI Doc posted.

 

 

Conclusion:

The process for the Physical Inventory Application in SAP Fiori is provided.

entry.title: Re: Rise With SAP - The FUE Game
entry.content:
Wow - So if you want people to goods receipt - they need a full license - and the fact it can change at any time! Good call out.

Actually - Just checked the latest version and I can't see a related auth object upgraded to professional? Maybe this was incorrectly done?

entry.title: Re: Securing Data Journey with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: The most most comprehensive security blog on SAP Business Data Cloud. Worthwhile for everyone to bookmark this post and refer as a guide. Thank you, Jana

entry.title: Re: Modify SFTP Report
entry.content: You would need to make changes in the PRD report i.e export the report that you are using, make changes in Plateau Report Designer, reimport it and then update the REPORT settings in configuration. Important to bear in mind that if the items that you want to report on changes you will need to do a new update in PRD again.  It would be better and less time consuming to schedule the report for your team member that has the filters applied so that they only get the data that they need, so instead of getting the report via FTP they will get it via email

entry.title: HTML5 application gives error " File not found" after successful deployment in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear BTP gurus,

I need help since the update for the SAP Build, which now allows us to select the dev spaces, full-stack node js, and preview before creating the project in BAS. Now the deployed CAP application although can now be visibly present in the SAP BTP Cockpit HTML5 application, when clicked, is giving us error "File not found".

 

Basically, before this error, it is straight forward that before build and deployment the usual step is as below only:

 

1.  cds add mta

2. cds add workzone-standard

3. cds add postgres (i'm using postgres db as my DB, and fixing the package.json and mta.yaml to remove HANA db dependencies)

4 mbt build

5 cf deploy

 

I'm posting here my descriptor file(mta.yaml) for reference, please kindly help.

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: sample123
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
enable-parallel-deployments: true
deploy_mode: html5-repo
build-parameters:
before-all:
- builder: custom
commands:
- npm ci
- npx cds build --production
modules:
- name: sample123-srv
type: nodejs
path: gen/srv
parameters:
instances: 1
buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
build-parameters:
builder: npm-ci
provides:
- name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
properties:
srv-url: ${default-url}
requires:
- name: sample123-auth
- name: sample123-destination
- name: sample123-postgres

- name: sample123-app-deployer
type: com.sap.application.content
path: gen
requires:
- name: sample123-html5-repo-host
parameters:
content-target: true
build-parameters:
build-result: app/
requires:
- name: sample123assets
artifacts:
- assets.zip
target-path: app/
- name: sample123sample123.firstapp
artifacts:
- sample123.firstapp.zip
target-path: app/

- name: sample123assets
type: html5
path: app/assets
build-parameters:
build-result: dist
builder: custom
commands:
- npm ci
- npm run build
supported-platforms:
[]
- name: sample123sample123.firstapp
type: html5
path: app/sample123.firstapp
build-parameters:
build-result: dist
builder: custom
commands:
- npm ci
- npm run build
supported-platforms:
[]

- name: sample123-destinations
type: com.sap.application.content
requires:
- name: sample123-auth
parameters:
service-key:
name: sample123-auth-key
- name: sample123-html5-repo-host
parameters:
service-key:
name: sample123-html5-repo-host-key
- name: srv-api
- name: sample123-destination
parameters:
content-target: true
build-parameters:
no-source: true
parameters:
content:
instance:
existing_destinations_policy: update
destinations:
- Name: sample123-html5-repository
ServiceInstanceName: sample123-html5-repo-host
ServiceKeyName: sample123-html5-repo-host-key
sap.cloud.service: sample123.service
- Name: sample123-auth
Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
ServiceInstanceName: sample123-auth
ServiceKeyName: sample123-auth-key
sap.cloud.service: sample123.service

- name: sample123-postgres-deployer
type: nodejs
path: gen/pg
parameters:
buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
no-route: true
no-start: true
tasks:
- name: deploy-to-postgresql
command: npm start
requires:
- name: sample123-postgres

resources:
- name: sample123-auth
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: xsuaa
service-plan: application
path: ./xs-security.json

- name: sample123-destination
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: destination
service-plan: lite
config:
HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
init_data:
instance:
existing_destinations_policy: update
destinations:
- Name: srv-api
URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
Authentication: NoAuthentication
Type: HTTP
ProxyType: Internet
HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: true
HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
- Name: ui5
URL: https://ui5.sap.com
Authentication: NoAuthentication
Type: HTTP
ProxyType: Internet
requires:
- name: srv-api
group: destinations
properties:
name: srv-api # must be used in xs-app.json as well
url: ~{srv-url}
forwardAuthToken: true

- name: sample123-html5-repo-host
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: html5-apps-repo
service-plan: app-host
- name: sample123-html5-runtime
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: html5-apps-repo
service-plan: app-runtime
- name: sample123-postgres
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: postgresql-db
service-plan: standard

entry.title: Re: Cross-plant CM is not same with plant-specific config...
entry.content:
@thomas_machts,

1. I check change history for configurable material, there is no this kind of changes.

2. I find additional information is that the cross-plant CM from another configurable material.

entry.title: Re: Issue in Creating SAP Fiori Elements List Report Usin...
entry.content: Check the Service Binding, there should be multiple views listed in there. One of them would be ZPTD_C_PROJ_FIN_REP and there should be another one with ZPTD_C_PROJ_FIN_REPSet. Please use the one that ends with Set and you should be able to see all fields. Thanks

entry.title: Re: RAP: Modify column values in Object page items table via custom action
entry.content: Any reason why you haven't defined this function in RAP BO? Defining this function in RAP BO would make your life much simpler.

entry.title: Re: Select checkbox automatically in RAP based Fiori Elem...
entry.content:
This is the standard Select All button:

If that doesn't workout for you, you may define a custom function in the list report to do that.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP Use of Custom Enity as Association
entry.content: Custom entity has many restrictions and functionality what you are trying to achieve isn't available.

entry.title: Re: UI does not load on BTP launchpad Application - CAPM Model UI5 Fiori
entry.content: how to do this " If i add it manually in the URL"? where to add

entry.title: Re: Using ABAP RAP, show radio buttons in a popup
entry.content: The popup is autogenerated using a standard template and can only display fields that are available in that template. So, options like radio button, file upload etc aren't available yet in the popup. Instead of radio button group, you may use a dropdown list with your 4 options and let the user choose any one option from that list. That should give you the same results as a radio button group. Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Determination isn't the correct place to code such things.

Use default function: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/ABENBDL_DEFAULT_FUNCTION.html

entry.title: Test Automation Tool in post upgrade test
entry.content: Does TAT have reports on the results of all the test processes executed? If not, can integration with ALM provide the results automatically?

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - IMAP and SMTP connection to Gmail with OAuth2 Authorization Code
entry.content:
Hi @Gowtami_G_Rao 

Please check section Integration Suite Section Step 3 on your Authorization URL and Token Service URL.

From your screen shot, you are using a different Token Service URL.

Regards

Jun Yan

entry.title: test automation tool
entry.content: After allowing SAP to run post upgrade test automatically, do we still have to maintain variants for the system to run the tests. If so, what is the difference between manual execution and sap automation?

entry.title: Process of creating Stock Transfer Order and Delivery using Purchase Requisition in SAP Fiori
entry.content:
Purchase Requisition:

  • A Purchase Requisition (PR) is an internal document requesting the procurement of materials or services.
  • It serves as a trigger for the purchasing department to create purchase orders.
  • PRs can be created manually or automatically based on MRP or consumption.

Stock Transfer Order (STO):

  • A Stock Transfer Order is used to move stock between plants or storage locations within an organization.
  • It ensures proper documentation and tracking of internal stock movements.
  • STOs can include delivery and billing steps, especially in intercompany scenarios.

Outbound Delivery:

  • An Outbound Delivery document controls the shipment of goods to a customer or another location.
  • It initiates warehouse activities such as picking, packing, and goods issue.
  • It is typically created from a sales order or stock transport order.

 

Process of creating Stock Transfer Order and Outbound Delivery using Purchase Requisition in SAP Fiori

Step1: Display Purchase requisition:

 

Step2:

In order to convert the Purchase requisitions to Purchase orders :Open the app- Create Purchase order Advanced

Select the Document Overview On:

Select the Variant :

 

Select the Purchase requisitions:

Choose Open only:

This selection will populate the Open Purchase requistions that as to be converted to purchase orders.

Input the Material, supplying plant

Select execute:

The above selection displays the Open Purchase requisitions.

Select the Purchase requisitions and Choose Adopt Icon.

The Purchase requisition details such as quantities, Delivery dates are copied into PO.

Change the Document type to UB: Stock transport order as highlighted.

The Supplying plant, material, quantities and delivery dates are copied from the Purchase requisition.

The Price fields will not be populated as this is an Intra stock transport order.

Scroll towards the column Issuing storage location and input the issuing storage location:

Select the Save option:

System generates the PO number:

 

 

Step3:

To ship the items from the warehouse we have to create an Outbound delivery document.

The Outbound delivery document acts as a reference document in the warehouse through which we can execute the Pick, pack and ship.

 On the dashboard.

Click on the app:

Input the Purchase order number and click on Execute:

Select the line item and choose background:

Select the line and choose the highlighted field to display the delivery number:

 The outbound delivery is displayed:

 

The Outbound delivery is created for the Stock Transfer Order.

 

Conclusion:

Process of creating Stock Transfer Order and Outbound Delivery using Purchase Requisition in SAP Fiori is provided.

entry.title: Re: Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine
entry.content: @Phil_from_Madrid     Great Question. Although SAP HANA Cloud is the core DB component of Datasphere, not all the multimodel capabilities will be enabled by default, example document store. And the reason being you have to access all the released capabilities using the SaaS layer. Datasphere will be introducing prebuilt KGs soon, but not sure of the timeline.  I would suggest you to raise an incident with SAP Datasphere support team to see if they enable it.

entry.title: Batch Input on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition has the apps for batch input session.

ex.  My Batch Input Sessions(SM35SA), Batch Input My logs(SM35PSM) ...

But, I don't know how to create the batch input session.

What can apps create the batch input session?

entry.title: Re: Facing Issue in GOS Attachment for MM03
entry.content:
Hello @SanketGode45 

Instead of custom file upload handling, you can use the standard class CL_GOS_DOCUMENT_SERVICE for uploading GOS documents. The CREATE_ATTACHMENT method already manages imports from PC. Please refer to the sample code below:

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

*& Report ZFIX_ERROR_UPLOAD

*&

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

*&

*&

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

REPORT zfix_error_upload.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 10: Data Declaration

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

DATA lo_gos_document TYPE REF TO cl_gos_document_service.

DATA ls_object TYPE borident.

DATA lf_atta TYPE borident-objkey.

DATA lf_brelguid TYPE srgbtbrel-brelguid.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 20: Selection screen

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE t1.

PARAMETERS p_matnr TYPE mara-matnr OBLIGATORY.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 30: Initialization

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

INITIALIZATION.

lo_gos_document = NEW cl_gos_document_service( ).

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 40:Start of selection

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

START-OF-SELECTION.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 50: Obj. key

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

ls_object = VALUE #( objtype = 'BUS1001006'

objkey = p_matnr ).

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 60: GOS - Create attachment

" *********************************************************************

lo_gos_document->create_attachment( EXPORTING is_object = ls_object

IMPORTING ep_attachment = lf_atta ).

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 70: Check attachment is returned

" *********************************************************************

IF xsdbool( lf_atta IS INITIAL ) = abap_false.

COMMIT WORK AND WAIT.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 80: Read obj. table

" *********************************************************************

SELECT SINGLE brelguid FROM srgbtbrel

INTO lf_brelguid

WHERE instid_b = lf_atta.

" ---------------------------------------------------------------------

" 90: Success

IF xsdbool( lf_brelguid IS NOT INITIAL ) = abap_true.

MESSAGE 'Document successfully linked to material' TYPE 'S'.

ENDIF.

ELSE.

" handle failed keys

ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi,

Noticed that java startup command includes: -agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,address=8000,server=y,suspend=n 

which enables remote debugging.

Why do you enable it by default? Don't we need to disable it for production?

entry.title: Re: Reassigning tasks in Onboarding (2.0)
entry.content: Has anyone found an answer to this?

entry.title: Plng strategy grp MRP 3 view changes don't update Proposed Strategy on Adv planning tab matl master
entry.content:
Experts:

When we initially create a material, the Plng Strategy Group from MRP 3 view updates the Proposed Strategy field on the Advanced Planning tab. Any subsequent updates to this field on MRP 3 view doesn't automatically reflect onto the Adv Planning tab. I am only referring to the Strategy groups supported by standard SAP in PPDS (like 40, 50, etc).

Any settings to overcome this issue?

Cheers

entry.title: Trigger automatic follow-up survey 30 minutes before course end in SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I noted the follow-up survey of a course is triggered automatically upon marking completion of a training history to a learner.

I am looking at any workaround that we can make the follow-up survey to trigger 30 minutes earlier before the course end. It appears that is not a out-of-the-box configuration available in learning administration.

Grateful if anyone could suggest the case.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Custom field update in VBAK table
entry.content:
@3253405293 

You were adding your query in a post which has been created 10 years back and nobody will respond to you.

Whatever issue you have, please create a new post, adding details of the issue with the related screen shot and your findings so far made.  This will be easy and the members will assist you.

entry.title: Re: Roth limits for Employee Contributions
entry.content: The limits are working now, thank you

entry.title: How to manage CPI accounts across same org different country?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in the process of migrating from PO to CPI. I am in the process of building POCs.

Q2: How to manage the CPI migration where in our current stack we use two PIs in different countries sending ? For example, in PO1 we use a file to soap over proxy to connect with PO2 to send data over to other country's SAP and non SAP systems.

Q2: Another question important to me is File interface. In CPI1 if we want to send/receive files, how to replace the shared drives? I have come across something called cloud connector, how will it help me and can you please share any docs that will help me to create a POC.  And if we want the CPI1 to send files to shared drives in another country, can we still use cloud connector for CPI1 to send files or do we need to send it to the CPI that the team in the other country setup?

Thanks

entry.title: Adding Revlv field in ME2M Report
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I adding revlv field in ME2M Report using ME_CHANGE_OUTTAB_CUS~FILL_OUTTAB. Its working fine. but if i click delivery schedule dump error occur. Kindy help me please. Urgent issues in Production

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC automation public cloud Netherlands
entry.content:
To use SAP Public Cloud for automatic filing of VAT returns and ECL (Electronic Communication with the Tax Authorities) in the Netherlands, you typically need to install a digital certificate to authenticate communication with the Dutch tax authorities.

 

Certificate Requirements for the Netherlands:

 

1. PKIoverheid Certificate:

 

The Netherlands Tax and Customs Administration uses the PKIoverheid certificate standard for secure communication.

 

You need an "Organisatiecertificaat" (Organization Certificate) issued by an approved Certificate Authority (CA) under the PKIoverheid framework.

 

 

 

2. Certificate Purpose:

 

The certificate ensures secure authentication, encryption, and data integrity during data exchanges between your SAP system and the Dutch tax authorities.

 

 

 

3. Approved Certificate Authorities (CAs): Examples of trusted providers in the Netherlands include:

 

KPN

 

QuoVadis

 

Digidentity

 

Sectigo

 

Other PKIoverheid-accredited providers.

 

 

 

4. Certificate Type:

 

Select a server or organization certificate, depending on your setup and the specific requirements of the interface you're configuring.

 

 

 

 

 

---

 

Steps to Install the Certificate in SAP Public Cloud:

 

1. Obtain the Certificate:

 

Purchase the PKIoverheid certificate from an approved provider.

 

Ensure you have the private key and any necessary intermediate certificates.

 

 

 

2. Convert the Certificate (if necessary):

 

If the certificate isn't in the required format (e.g., .PFX/.P12), convert it using tools like OpenSSL.

 

 

 

3. Upload the Certificate to SAP:

 

Log in to the SAP KeyStore via the SAP Cloud Identity Services or the relevant area in your SAP tenant.

 

Navigate to the certificate upload section and import your PKIoverheid certificate.

 

 

 

4. Map the Certificate to Your Communication Scenario:

 

Configure the communication scenario in SAP to use the installed certificate for authentication.

 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, this configuration is typically done in the Communication Management settings.

 

 

 

5. Test the Connection:

 

Conduct a test run to ensure successful communication with the Dutch tax authorities (e.g., testing VAT return submission).

 

 

 

 

 

---

 

Verification and Maintenance:

 

Renewals: Keep track of the certificate expiration date and renew it before it expires.

 

Backup: Securely store the private key and certificate details to prevent loss.

 

Periodic Testing: Regularly test the connection to ensure the configuration remains valid.

Let me know of you need more information on this.

 

Hope this answer your question.

 

Thanks

Divyesh

entry.title: Recommended Certifications to Start as a Junior SAP FICO Consultant
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m just starting out in SAP with an interest in becoming a junior FICO consultant.
Which certifications would you recommend as the best starting point to build a solid foundation?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Jhosep S.

entry.title: Re: Code Connect 2025: UI5con, reCAP, HANA Tech Con
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Join us for the second annual  Code Connect, where we're bringing together the hottest tech events in one convenient location. Be ready to connect, collaborate, and code away with a bustling community of like-minded developers. Jump on the Code Connect train and elevate your conference experience."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Validation using External Hooks in SAP Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
@Yogananda 

1.Correct, the extension field 'ZMarketingCampaignID' need to be added to respective Product screen through UI Adaptation.

2. PostHook - yes, as per standard documentation, possible to update extension field in PostHook 

3.Notification - The  messages are displayed on population of warning and error in the script.


      if (!marketingCampaignId || marketingCampaignId.trim() === '') {
        console.log('Item validation error: marketingCampaignId is missing');
        errors.push({
          code: 'Opportunity_Item_Validation.10002',
          message: 'Marketing campaign ID is missing',
          target: '{marketingCampaignId}'
        });
      }
@Harish_Singh

entry.title: WebI report fails to load data in the first run
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a WebI report which fails to display data against the prompted filter values for the first run, however, performing an immediate refresh(pressing the refresh button while open) successfully fetches and displays the data.

This behavior is observed only for the first run and a subsequent close-> reopen->refresh while opening seems good, however when I try to open the same report after 3 or 4 days, the behavior repeats.

(Note - For one of the user, the behavior is continuous even reopening the report observes the behavior and an immediate re-refresh looks good).

Also, the webi report has 2 data providers and as per our investigation the second DP fetches 90% of rows and later in the immediate refresh fetch overall data.

Please advice if it is due to any possible server or configuration issues? or any developmental issues?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Manage SAP Build projects as part of your enterprise architecture
entry.content: This integration will be highly valuable, especially for customers who have yet to transition to S/4HANA from ECC6, but have already deployed BTP.

entry.content: okay can u move the code to the USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE in the same include MV45AFZZ? and see the results.

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Individual Goal rating from Performanc...
entry.content: Hi @xavierlegarrec, if client has yet to implement PMGM (but it's on the roadmap) and they would want to use Variable Pay, can we use MDF objects to store those performance ratings and add them to Entry field level in VP?

entry.title: Re: SAP Task Center setup for S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Sorry to introduce to your notice.

I am facing an issue on Task center app. not able to auto reflect the s/4hana tasks to task Center app. Plese suggest any jobs to be run to pull the tasks from s/4hana to reflect to Task center.

example :

My Inbox app had 9 items where as task center app had 6 items.  

Noticed that when we remove and re-assign tc.enable=true property on destination it is fetching tasks but that is not best practice. please suggest way of working..

I have downloaded the task enter cache as well there also newly created tasks not appearing in the cache folder.

Regards,

Brahma

entry.title: Re: Getting error in SAP Integration Suite IFLOW - Unreso...
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh

   The Curl info in POSTMAN for token is

curl --location --request POST 'https://apisXXXXXXXXXX/v1/auth/token' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
--data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' \
--data-urlencode 'response_type=token' \
--data-urlencode 'client_id=6XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX' \
--data-urlencode 'client_secret=QXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'
 
How is this going to help?
 
When my iflow has only 2 steps: content modifier and then request reply how will this token help?
 
The HTTP adapter for the receiver I have given OAuth client credentials.
 
Thanks
Gopal

entry.title: Unnecessary objects are visible while applying Leave in absence UI
entry.content:
Hi All,

For the users across all the geographies, while applying leave they are able to view unnecessary objects visible in absence UI for few seconds and disappearing.

e.g. : while applying/initiating basic Earned Leave (EL) requests in the iCore system, we have observed that many uncertain fields, which are irrelevant or incorrectly marked as mandatory are being displayed during the application process for few seconds before disappearing. :

Please help how can we overcome this issue.
HCM Time Management 

Regards,
Rachana

The error "authentication is missing in data" goes away when adding the authentication field, but it is unclear what to put in there. When putting (BASE64 encoded value for) OAuth it says invalid value "OAuth" for authentication.

entry.title: Re: Time Management-Impact of Editing the field present i...

entry.title: Re: Robust authentication for External candidates in SAP SuccessFactors with SAP Customer Data Cloud
entry.content: Hi @samanthawong : When the candidate uses social login provider,social login account is leveraged to create an account .The candidate needs  still needs to fill the candidate information ,accept the DPCS and proceed further.

entry.title: How to maintain multiple vendor IDs for a single Ariba SLP supplier organization
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We have a requirement for associating multiple vendor IDs with a single supplier ANID that's used for both SAP Business Network and Ariba Sourcing. We recognize that this is possible in SAP Business Network, but we're unsure whether we can do the same for Ariba SLP supplier organization, which is used for Guided Sourcing events.

We've asked SAP Services about the solution, and they informed us that it's not possible to create multiple supplier organizations (for each vendor ID) in Ariba and tie them to the same supplier ANID. However, they suggested it might be possible to register multiple vendor IDs to a single supplier organization.

We attempted to upload a test supplier with multiple vendor IDs in our internal system by importing records that are identical except for the vendor ID, but it was unsuccessful—the system registered them as separate organizations. Could you please confirm if this is possible, and if so, provide instructions on how to implement this?

 
Thanks,
Chinatsu

entry.title: Re: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#...
entry.content:
Hi @Chandan_Singh91 ,

Could please be more specific?

Thanks,

Rithika
